package.name: agenticros_sim
package.description: AgenticROS Gazebo Harmonic simulation assets: indoor world, 2-wheel AMR model (depth camera + GPU lidar + IMU), ros_gz_bridge config that exposes topics on AgenticROS' real-robot topic names, and a launch file that wires it all together. Use with the agenticros CLI: agenticros up sim-amr.
